title: Minecraft Ultra Renaissance
description: Discover Minecraft Renaissance! This modpack optimizes Minecraft and adds subtle improvements without losing the vanilla essence. It’s what you’ve always dreamed of for your Minecraft world!
body:
### This is my first time creating a modpack. Any suggestions to improve it are more than welcome!
 

# FEATURES:
### Unbelievable visual enhancements:
Dive into a complete visual rediscovery of Minecraft! Marvel at the new effects as you walk, swim, take damage, or approach an Enderman… ✨
### Immersive sounds:
Feel truly immersed in nature! Explore every new sound, and occasionally stop to admire the scenery and listen attentively to each sound. 🏜️
### Full vanilla experience:
Test every new little feature we add; we only enhance the vanilla experience, without new blocks, complex mechanics, or confusing items.
### New terrain generator:
Dive into the new terrain generation, featuring over 100 new biomes, all using pure vanilla blocks!
### Fully optimizated:
Say goodbye to the dreadful vanilla optimization.
### Crafted entirely with Fabric mods:
Experience the total smoothness that Sodium brings! 🚀 Plus, we support shaders and more mods. And yes… Fresh Animations too!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/igqGjwWhirM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

IMPORTANT: This modpack has the NVIDIUM mod, if your device doesn´t have a nvidia graphics card, PLEASE DELETE IT.
